---

## PulseBoard channel plugin — `extensions/pulseboard/`

**20 new files, no existing files modified.**

### Package / manifest
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest — declares `id: "pulseboard"` and channel list |
| `package.json` | NPM package `@openclaw/pulseboard`, wires up the entry points and channel metadata |

### Entry points
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `index.ts` | Calls `defineChannelPluginEntry` — registers the plugin and its runtime setter |
| `setup-entry.ts` | Calls `defineSetupPluginEntry` — used by the setup wizard launcher |
| `api.ts` | Public barrel — re-exports `accounts.ts` and `setup-surface.ts` for external consumers |

### Core source (`src/`)
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `runtime-api.ts` | Private runtime barrel — re-exports shared channel dispatch utilities from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/irc` (the only SDK surface that currently exposes `dispatchInboundReplyWithBase`) |
| `runtime.ts` | Runtime store using `createPluginRuntimeStore` — `getPulseBoardRuntime` / `setPulseBoardRuntime` |
| `types.ts` | TypeScript types: `PulseBoardAccountConfig`, `PulseBoardGroupConfig`, `PulseBoardInboundMessage`, `PulseBoardProbe`, `CoreConfig` |
| `config-schema.ts` | Zod config schema (`PulseBoardConfigSchema`) built with `buildChannelConfigSchema`; validates `url`, `apiToken`, `username`, `boards`, DM/group policies |
| `config-ui-hints.ts` | Human-readable labels and help text for the config UI |
| `accounts.ts` | Account resolution — reads from config, merges named accounts, falls back to `PULSEBOARD_URL` / `PULSEBOARD_USERNAME` / `PULSEBOARD_API_TOKEN` env vars; token also resolved from `apiTokenFile` |
| `normalize.ts` | Target normalization — boards are `#name`, DMs are plain usernames; accepts `board:`, `user:`, `pulseboard:` prefixes; allow-list entry normalization |
| `policy.ts` | Group access gating — `resolvePulseBoardGroupMatch`, `resolvePulseBoardGroupAccessGate`, `resolvePulseBoardRequireMention`, `resolvePulseBoardGroupSenderAllowed` |
| `probe.ts` | Health check — `GET {url}/api/health` with bearer token; returns `PulseBoardProbe` with latency |
| `send.ts` | Outbound delivery — `POST /api/boards/:name/messages` or `/api/dm/:user/messages`; applies markdown table conversion |
| `monitor.ts` | Provider lifecycle — opens a WebSocket at `wss://.../ws/events`, dispatches inbound messages, reconnects on disconnect, honours `AbortSignal` for clean shutdown |
| `inbound.ts` | Inbound routing — full DM/board policy enforcement (pairing, allowlist, open, disabled), mention gating, group sender checks, control-command gate, then `dispatchInboundReplyWithBase` |
| `channel.ts` | Main `ChannelPlugin` — wires everything together via `createChatChannelPlugin`; declares `chatTypes: ["direct", "group"]`, `textChunkLimit: 4000`, directory, status/probe adapter, gateway startup, pairing, security warnings, and outbound delivery |
| `setup-core.ts` | Programmatic setup helpers — `pulseBoardSetupAdapter`, `updatePulseBoardAccountConfig`, `setPulseBoardDmPolicy`, `setPulseBoardAllowFrom` |
| `setup-surface.ts` | Interactive setup wizard — prompts for server URL, username, API token, and DM policy; `pulseBoardSetupWizard` |
